name: Gentlemen
overview: Gentlemen is a new-age RomCom web series. As it is a serio-comic drama, laughter, satire, and humor dominates the plot. What happens to to three middle aged men as they want to recover from the midlife crisis, forms the crux of the story.

trailers.title: Trailer - Gentlemen | Riddhi Barua | Korok Murmu |Mir, Rudranil, Joy, Madhurima | May 19 | Addatimes
